---
title: "Projects"
---

## AI Salary Disparities Analysis
This project explored salary differences across AI and non-AI roles using large-scale job posting data. I cleaned and analyzed the dataset using Python, Spark, and Quarto, then created visualizations to examine salary patterns by industry, region, and work arrangement.

**Tools used:** Python, PySpark, Quarto, Plotly, Pandas

---

## Skill Gap Analysis
This project compared team skill levels against market-demanded technical skills identified from job posting data. The analysis highlighted strengths in SQL, Python, and data visualization, while identifying cloud computing and NLP as areas for improvement.

**Tools used:** Python, Pandas, Matplotlib, Seaborn

---

## Add Another Academic or Personal Project
Include one or two more projects here with:
- project goal
- methods/tools
- key result
- optional link or image
